service.name: DeepSeek R1 Reasoning API
service.description_for_ai: DeepSeek reasoning model — shows chain-of-thought thinking before final answer. Comparable to OpenAI o1/o3 in math, coding, and complex reasoning tasks. 10-50x cheaper than OpenAI o3. Best open reasoning model available.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Solve complex problems with visible chain-of-thought reasoning. Math, science, coding, logic. Returns reasoning_content (thinking) + content (final answer).

agent_hints.reasoning_content: reasoning_content contains the internal thinking process — show to users for transparency.
agent_hints.vs_deepseek_chat: Use deepseek-reasoner for hard problems (math, algorithms, logic). Use deepseek-chat (V3) for everyday tasks at 4x lower cost.
agent_hints.pricing: With cache hits: $0.055/$0.219 per 1M tokens — ultra cheap for cached prompts.
